servers.name: Context7
servers.description: Up-to-date library documentation and code examples by library name.

servers.name: DeepWiki
servers.description: AI-powered Q&A and wiki browsing for any public GitHub repository indexed on DeepWiki.

servers.name: GitMCP — MCP servers repo
servers.description: Documentation search across the modelcontextprotocol/servers repository (concrete starting point; gitmcp.io serves any GitHub repo at /<owner>/<repo>).

servers.name: Cloudflare Docs
servers.description: AI-powered search over the Cloudflare documentation site.

servers.name: Hugging Face Hub
servers.description: Search and browse models, datasets, and papers on Hugging Face Hub. Anonymous access is rate-limited; bearer token (optional) raises the cap.

servers.name: Netdata Registry
servers.description: Live infrastructure data from a public Netdata parent — metrics, anomalies, alerts, processes.

servers.name: Manifold Markets
servers.description: Browse prediction markets — search questions, get market details, look up users (play money).

servers.name: NYC Transit (MTA)
servers.description: Real-time NYC subway, bus, ferry, LIRR, Metro-North, and Citibike arrivals and alerts.

servers.name: Ferryhopper
servers.description: Search ferry routes and live availability across Greek and European ports.

servers.name: Cloudflare API
servers.description: Full Cloudflare API access — Workers, R2, KV, DNS, etc. OAuth required.
